raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declaring a personal commitment to interrupt distorted thinking through deliberate reframing",
  "implicit_claims": ["Catastrophizing can be reliably detected in real time", "A distinguishable 'realistic worst case' exists and is accessible", "Willingness alone suffices to shift from distortion to realism"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Coherent as a compact statement of reflective intent; no internal contradictions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The speaker has sufficient metacognitive distance and the emotional stakes permit calm enumeration of outcomes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If the exercise is used to intellectualize rather than feel, or if 'realistic' remains filtered through the original catastrophic lens"
}
